Tabler Core assets
==================

Vendored from the official `@tabler/core` npm package:

- version: `1.4.0`
- release tag: `@tabler/core@1.4.0`
- release commit: `2c73788cd11e33cb6355613887e4d44c9e7c0f5b`
- source: `https://github.com/tabler/tabler`
- license: MIT, see `LICENSE`

Only compiled core CSS/JS are included. Source map comments were removed because
source maps are not shipped. Preview, demo, marketing, sponsor, CDN, and
tracking assets are not included.
